title: Duas to be recited after every obligatory salaat in the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Duas to be recited after all obligatory salaat in the month of Ramadan
Ya Aliyo Ya Azeem
duas.description: It has been narrated to recite this dua after each and every obligatory prayer in the month of Ramadan:

segments.translation: O Most High! O All-great!
O All-forgiving! O All-merciful!
You are the All-great Lord
like Whom there is nothing,
and He is the All-hearing, the All-aware.
This is a month that You have glorified, ennobled,
honored, and preferred to the other months.

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلشَّهْرُ ٱلَّذِي فَرَضْتَ صِيَامَهُ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa alshsharhu alladhi faradta siyamahu `alayya
segments.translation: It is the month that You imposed upon me to observe fasting in it.

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ ٱلَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa shahru ramadana alladhi anzalta fihi alqur`ana
segments.translation: It is the month of Ramadan during which You revealed the Qur'an

segments.arabic: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَٱلْفُرْقَانِ
segments.transliteration: hudan linnasi wa bayyinatin min alhuda walfurqani
segments.translation: as guidance for people, clear proofs on true guidance, and distinction (between the right and the wrong).
You decided the Grand Night to be in it

segments.transliteration: wa ja`altaha khayran min alfi shahrin
segments.translation: and You have decided it to be more favorable that one thousand months.

segments.arabic: فَيَا ذَا ٱلْمَنِّ وَلاَ يُمَنُّ عَلَيْكَ
segments.translation: So, O Lord of graces! None can ever do favor to You!

segments.arabic: مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ فِي مَنْ تَمُنُّ عَلَيْهِ
segments.transliteration: munna `alayya bifakaki raqabati min alnnari fi man tamunnu `alayhi
segments.translation: please, do me a favor by releasing me from the Fire and by including me with those to whom You do this favor,
and allow me to enter Paradise,
on account of Your mercy. O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

duas.title: Allahumma Adhkil 'Ala
duas.description: In ‘al-Misbah’ and in ‘al-Balad al-Amin’, Shaykh al-Kaf`amiy, as well as Shaykh al-Shahid in ‘al-Majmu`ah’, have narrated that the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said that one who says the following supplication after each obligatory prayer in Ramadan will have all his sins forgiven at the Resurrection Day:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَدْخِلْ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ ٱلْقُبُورِ ٱلسُّرُورَ
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) give pleasure to the inhabitants of graves (i.e. the dead).
O Allah, (please do) enrich all the poor .
O Allah, (please do) satisfy all hungry ones.
O Allah, (please do) provide all the naked with clothes.
O Allah, (please do) help all the debtors settle their debts.
O Allah, (please do) relieve all the aggrieved ones.
O Allah, (please do) help all the strangers to return home.
O Allah, (please do) release all prisoners.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ كُلَّ فَاسِدٍ مِنْ أُمُورِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aslih kulla fasidin min umuri almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) rectify all the Muslims’ affairs that are wrong.
O Allah, (please do) heal all the ailed ones.
O Allah, (please do) fill our poverty with Your richness.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ غَيِّرْ سُوءَ حَالِنَا بِحُسْنِ حَالِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ghayyir su'a halina bihusni halik
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) change our ill manners through Your excellent manners.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱقْضِ عَنَّا ٱلدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ ٱلْفَقْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma iqdi `anna alddayna wa aghnina min alfaqr
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) help us settle our debts and save us from poverty.
verily, You have power over all things.

duas.reference: Kafami’s Misbah, 617, Balad, 222; thence in Mustadrak, vii, 447, b 14, h 8623/2. Bihar, xcv,120, b 6, h 4, from Shahid Awwal.

duas.title: Allahumma Arzukni
duas.description: Sayyid Ibn Tawus has narrated that Imam Sadiq (peace be upon him) and Imam al-Kadhim (peace be upon him) have recommended the following is said after each and every obligatory prayer in the month of Ramadan:

segments.translation: O Allah, (please) confer upon me with the grace of pilgrimage to Your Holy House

segments.arabic: فِي عَامِي هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
segments.translation: in this year and every year

segments.arabic: مَا أَبْقَيْتَنِي فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَعَافِيَةٍ وَسَعَةِ رِزْقٍ
segments.transliteration: ma abqaytani fi yusrin minka wa `afiyatin wa sa`ati rizqin
segments.translation: as long as You keep me alive, with easiness, good health, and expansive sustenance from You.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُخْلِنِي مِنْ تِلْكَ ٱلْمَوَاقِفِ ٱلْكَرِيمَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tukhlini min tilka almawaqifi alkarimati
segments.translation: Do not deprive me of these noble situations,
holy places,

segments.arabic: وَزِيَارَةِ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّكَ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ziyarati qabri nabiyyika salawatuka `alayhi wa-alihi
segments.translation: and visiting the tomb of Your Prophet—may Your blessings be upon him and his Household.

segments.arabic: وَفِي جَمِيعِ حَوَائِجِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ فَكُنْ لِي
segments.transliteration: wa fi jami`i hawa`iji alddunya wal-akhirati fakun li
segments.translation: (Please) stand for me in all of my needs for this worldly life and the Next World.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِي مَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka fi ma taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You regarding that which You decide and determine

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلأَمْرِ ٱلْمَحْتُومِ فِي لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
segments.transliteration: min al-amri almahtumi fi laylati alqadri
segments.translation: from the inevitable decisions that You make on the Grand Night—

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْقَضَاءِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُرَدُّ وَلاَ يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqadha`i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu
segments.translation: decisions that are neither retreated nor altered—

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami
segments.translation: to include me with the pilgrims to Your Holy House
whose pilgrimage is admitted by You,
whose efforts are thankfully accepted by You,
whose sins are forgiven by You,
and whose offenses are pardoned by You.,

segments.transliteration: waj`al fi ma taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: Within Your determined decisions,
please decide for me a long life,
expansive sustenance,
and help to fulfill my trusts and settle my debts.
Respond to me, O Lord of the worlds!

duas.title: Dua Hajj
duas.description:
This supplication is known as ‘the Supplication of Hajj.’ Sayyid Ibn Tawus, in Iqbal, cites a report according to which Imam Jafar al-Sadiq (ca) prescribed its recitation after maghrib prayer during the nights of Ramadan.1 Kafcami says in Balad al-Amin that it is mustahab to recite it every day during the month of Ramadan as well as on the first night.
2 Shaykh Mufid, in Muqnicah, sites a report according to which this supplication is meant particularly for the first night, following the maghrib prayer

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي بِكَ وَمِنْكَ أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni bika wa minka atlubu hajati
segments.translation: O Allah, from You and by You, I beseech for settling my need.

segments.transliteration: wa man talaba hajatan ila alnnasi
segments.translation: If others beg people for settling their needs,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي إِلاَّ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inni la atlubu hajati illa minka
segments.translation: I ask none except You for settling my need;
from You alone, since You have no partner with You.
I thus implore You in the name of Your favor and Your pleasure,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi
segments.translation: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لِي فِي عَامِي هٰذَا إِلَىٰ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ سَبِيلاً
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala li fi `ami hadha ila baytika alharami sabilan
segments.translation: and to choose for me a way to Your Holy House this year:
a pilgrimage that is admitted,
accepted, pure,
and sincerely intended for You
by which You delight me
and raise my rank with You.
Confer upon me with the grace of making me cast my sight down (against what is illegal for me to look at),
making me act chastely,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ أَكُفَّ بِهَا عَنْ جَمِيعِ مَحَارِمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa an akuffa biha `an jami`i maharimika
segments.translation: and making me stop committing any deed that You have deemed unlawful

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ يَكُونَ شَيْءٌ آثَرَ عِنْدِي مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ وَخَشْيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yakuna shay`un athara `indi min ta`atika wa khashyatika
segments.translation: so that nothing will be more preferred in my sight than obedience to You, fear of You,
doing all that which You love,
and avoiding all that which You have detested and warned against.

segments.transliteration: waj`al dhalika fi yusrin wa yasarin
segments.translation: (Please) make all that take place with easiness, lenience,
and good health as well as the grace that You have bestowed upon me.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ وَفَاتِي قَتْلاً فِي سَبِيلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an taj`ala wafati qatlan fi sabilika
segments.translation: I beseech You to cause me to die as martyr for Your sake,
under the pennon of Your Prophet and in the line of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَقْتُلَ بِي أَعْدَاءَكَ وَأَعْدَاءَ رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an taqtula bi a`da'aka wa a`da'a rasulika
segments.translation: I ask You to make me a means of killing Your enemies and the enemies of Your Messenger.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُكْرِمَنِي بِهَوَانِ مَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an tukrimani bihawani man shi'ta min khalqika
segments.translation: I ask You to honor me through humiliation by any one of Your created beings that You choose,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهِنِّي بِكَرَامَةِ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhinni bikaramati ahadin min awliya'ika
segments.translation: and (O Allah) don’t humiliate me by giving me honor that will hurt (harm or derogate) any of your loved ones

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ لِي مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li ma`a alrrasuli sabilan
segments.translation: O Allah, find me a way with the Messenger.
Allah is Sufficient unto me! Only that which Allah wants shall take place.

duas.reference: 1 Kafi, iv, 74, h 6, thence in Wasa’il, x, 325, b 21, h 13519. Muqnicah, 314, b 10. Iqbal, 24, 39, thence in Bihar, xciv, 376, b 3, h 1, and Mustadrak, viii, 57, b 40, h 9064/2. Kafcami’s Misbah, 616, thence in Mustadrak, vii, 446, b 14, h 8622/1. Bihar, xcv, 1, b 5, h 1; xcvi, 27, b 3, h 3.

duas.title: During the last 10 Days
duas.description: In ’al-Balad al-Amin’, al-Kaf`amiy has mentioned that Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (a.s) used to say the following after Salat during the last 10 days of the month of Ramadhan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ أَدِّ عَنَّا حَقَّ مَا مَضَى مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma addi `anna haqqa ma madha min shahri ramadhana
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) help us fulfill the right of the past days of the month of Ramadhan,
And forgive us our shortcoming during it,
And receive it from us with acceptance,
And do not blame us for our extravagance in our affairs,
And include us with those upon whom mercy is had,
And do not include us with those deprived (of the awards of Ramadhan).

duas.title: Dua after Nafilah Salaat
duas.description:
The shortest supplications for in between the units of the recommended prayers for the month of Ramadhan may be for those who have an excuse and wish to recite short supplications, or they may be a part of longer supplication. It has been narrated, “Use the following supplications.”
Ali ibn Abdul Wahid narrated the following through a chain of documents on the authority of Raja ibn Yahya ibn Saman: “We obtained the following supplications from the house of our master Abi Muhammad Al-Hassan ibn Ali Al-Askari (MGB) in the year 255 A.H.” He reports the complete Al-Risal-i-al-Maqnea in its complete form and suggests that the following supplications be used in between each two units of the recommended prayers of the month of Ramadhan

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْعَظِيمِ الْمَحْتُوْمِ
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ij‘al fīmā taqḍī wa tuqaddiru min al-amri al-‘aẓīmi al-maḥtūm,
segments.translation: O Allah, make it among what You decree and determine of the great, concealed affair,

segments.arabic: وَفِيمَا تَفْرُقُ مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ
segments.transliteration: Wa fīmā tafruqu min al-amri al-ḥakīmi fī laylati al-qadr,
segments.translation: And among what You distribute of the wise affair on the Night of Decree,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ الْمَبْرُورِ حَجُّهُمُ الْمَشْكُورِ سَعْيُهُمُ الْمَغْفُورِ ذَنْبُهُم
segments.transliteration: An taj‘alani min ḥujjāji baytika al-ḥarāmi al-mabrūri ḥajjuhum al-mashkūri sa‘yuhum al-maghfūri dhanbuhum,
segments.translation: That You make me among the pilgrims to Your Sacred House, whose pilgrimage is accepted, whose effort is appreciated, and whose sins are forgiven.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي طَاعَتِكَ وَتُوَسِّعَ لِي فِي رِزْقِي
segments.transliteration: Wa as’aluka an tuṭīla ‘umrī fī ṭā‘atika wa tuwassi‘a lī fī rizqī,
segments.translation: And I ask You to prolong my life in obedience to You and to expand my sustenance,
O Most Merciful of the merciful.

_index_meta.title: Duas to be recited after every obligatory salaat in the month of Ramadan
